title: vittadinia australasica
intro: Vittadinia australasica, also known as the New South Wales daisy or tall daisy, is a flowering plant native to eastern Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vittadinia australasica are said to include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Vittadinia australasica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
